steps.title: Identify what the question needs
steps.content: The phrase 'making the data available again' is the key signal. The word again indicates that the data-transfer project is restoring something previously inaccessible — the blank must capture that restoration meaning.

steps.title: Eliminate the choices
steps.content:
• Choice A — persisting: means continuing to exist — says nothing about restoring access. ✗
  • Choice B — installing: means setting up for the first time — contradicts the 'again' signal. ✗
  • Choice C — renewing: means making useful again — directly matches the restoration idea. ✓
  • Choice D — exceeding: means surpassing — unrelated to restoring access. ✗
That is the correct answer.
